name: Wellspring Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Spiritual Font" (movement-bit grant, GrowthEngine HoldMovementBits) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, BOTH Lifefont (237) and Manafont (238) bits OR-set + HELD on the wielder's movement bitfield (+0x9C, base 230, MSB-first: 237=byte0 0x01, 238=byte1 0x80). Completes the never-run-dry fantasy: Absorb-MP refuels by poking, the fonts by walking. p3Desc: 'Grants Lifefont and Manafont: moving restores the wielder's HP and MP.' OPEN LIVE QUESTION: movement is normally exactly-one-effective (and Move+N blocks a font) — does the engine honor one bit or both? Every hold dev-logs each bit's PRE-write verdict (VerboseEvents): HELD = engine kept it since the last hold, REARMED = engine cleared it and the hold re-OR'd it, MISS = write rejected; one test battle answers it. Replaces the DRAFT Halve MP stack (invalid multi-grant style).

name: Spark Rod
sigNote: DRAFT grant ideas — +: Magick Boost (MA+1 Thunder potency); +2: Magick Boost + Concentration (never miss the cast); +3: Magick Boost + Concentration + Attack Boost (melee follow-up) (Lightning assault every swing)

name: Ember Rod
sigNote: DRAFT grant ideas — +: Magick Boost (MA+1 Fire potency); +2: Magick Boost + Defense Boost (survive return fire); +3: Magick Boost + Defense Boost + Attack Boost (offense + resilience) (Fire strikes every turn)

name: Frost Rod
sigNote: DRAFT grant ideas — +: Magick Boost (MA+1 Blizzard potency); +2: Magick Boost + Magick Def Boost (tank caster replies); +3: Magick Boost + Magick Def Boost + HP Boost (survive the fight) (Blizzard hits every swing)

name: Hushward Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Unbroken Chant" (support grant, Signatures/GrowthEngine HoldSignature path) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3 the wielder gains Swiftspell (support 226, +0x98 byte 3 mask 0x08), OR-set + held each tick; stacks with the player's own support pick; released (AND-cleared) if the rod leaves the wielder's hands mid-battle, never stripping a player-picked Swiftspell. Halved spell charge time deepens the anti-Silence identity. p3Desc: 'Grants Swiftspell: the wielder casts in half the usual time.' OPEN LIVE QUESTION: Swiftspell as a LIVE-held bit is unverified — charge time is computed at cast-queue so it should work (it is NOT in the IsBuildTimeOnly set); the GRANT read-back log + one timed cast settles it. Replaces the DRAFT triple stack (invalid multi-grant style).

name: Umbral Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Life Sap" (customRuntime, LifeSap.cs) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, a kill credited to this rod restores the wielder by 25% of max HP (Tuning.LifeSapPct=0.25; clamped at full; NEVER revives a 0-HP wielder). Trigger = the per-weapon kill-tally diff (the ExtraTurn freshKill pattern), so attribution rides the proven KillTracker credit. Wielder located via roster resolve + band twin-filter walk (Wielder.cs, shared locator split from ExtraTurn). Heal lands on the authoritative band entry HP, Mem.Writable-guarded. p3Desc: 'Defeating a foe restores a quarter of the wielder's health.' Replaces the DRAFT triple support stack (invalid multi-grant style); the dark rod drinks life — on theme with the Absorb-MP sibling.

name: Dragon Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Wyrmblood" (customRuntime, Wyrmblood.cs) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, at each wielder COMPLETED-turn edge (TurnTracker rising-Acted: the heal lands as the wielder finishes acting, adjacency from the post-move tile — not pre-move like vanilla Regen), the wielder AND every ALLY within 1 Manhattan tile heal their OWN maxHP/8 (Tuning.WyrmbloodDiv = vanilla Regen rate), clamped at full. EMULATED regen — the Regen status bit is unmapped, never touched; guarded HP writes on the authoritative band entries. Allies positively identified (static-array player-slot fingerprints — never enemies); dead never healed; one heal per fingerprint per splash. Each splash dev-logged. p3Desc: 'The wielder regenerates each turn, and the warmth mends adjacent allies.' Name 'Dragonheart' FORBIDDEN (Dragoon reaction collision). Replaces the DRAFT Regenerate stack with the same fantasy in buildable form.

name: Rod of Faith
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Rapture" (customRuntime, Rapture.cs) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, when the wielder's HP drops below 30% of max (Tuning.RaptureHpPct), Master Teleportation (movement 243 = ability.en key 499; Tuning.RaptureMoveId) REPLACES the movement field (band +0x80, 3 bytes) for 3 completed wielder turns (Tuning.RaptureTurns, TurnTracker), then the saved movement restores — Maim's save-once/hold/restore discipline (never-re-save). Re-arm hysteresis: HP must recover to/above the threshold between windows. Restores on unequip/tier loss/wielder death (3-tick streak)/battle exit; ConditionMet-style integer HP gate. CUT-CONTENT CAVEAT: 243 is marked cut in FOLDABLE_ABILITIES — arm-time read-back (SET/MISS) dev-logged once per window settles whether the engine honors it; if MISS, flip Tuning.RaptureMoveId to plain Teleport 242 (one line). p3Desc: 'Below a third health, the wielder gains Master Teleport for three turns.' The glass cannon's escape hatch — divine ecstasy at death's door. Replaces the DRAFT First Strike stack (invalid: reaction slot).
